_howto: Add one object per project. Required: tag (industry, geography), title, summary, metric, metricLabel. Optional: anonymous:true renders without the client name pressure, status:'placeholder' renders as a dashed coming-soon card. Run `node scripts/gencases.mjs` after editing.

cases.title: RockProsUSA: 13 quarries on one agentic dispatch system
cases.summary: Dispatch, invoicing and reporting moved onto agents across 13 quarry sites. Truck assignment proposed with its reasoning attached, invoices 3-way matched without a human pass, daily reports written by 6 AM. Cycle time fell 38% in the first quarter after cutover; 11,200 operations hours returned in year one.
cases.metricLabel: dispatch cycle time · 2,140 invoices, zero touches

cases.title: CitiSense: AI marketing & sales platform for agencies
cases.summary: An AI-enabled marketing and sales platform for advertising and creative agencies and display teams, campaign operations, sales workflows and reporting carried by agents so the creative teams do creative work.

cases.title: Freight reconciliation on agents
cases.summary: Every carrier bill line matched against weighbridge, gate and delivery data; clean lines cleared automatically, disputes queued with evidence bundles attached.

cases.title: AR follow-up: no account goes quiet
cases.summary: Receivables chased on cadence, escalated on rules; promises to pay tracked to their date and re-chased the morning after they break.

cases.title: 20+ more engagements being written up
cases.summary: We are documenting the full portfolio, industrial, agency, logistics, SaaS and D2C engagements, in the same receipts-first format. Each entry ships with numbers we can defend.
